name: Peanut Butter Snowballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the sugar, peanut butter, and butter; mix well.
2. Shape into 1-inch balls and place on a waxed paper-lined cookie sheet.
3. Chill for 30 minutes or until firm.
4. Meanwhile, melt the coating in a double boiler or microwave-safe bowl.
5. Dip the balls and place on waxed paper to harden.
